name: Baked Apple French Toast
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Melt the butter, add the brown sugar and water. Slice the apples, leaving the skin on, and simmer them in the butter mixture for 1 to 2 minutes. Pour the mixture into a 13" x 9" x 2-inch pan and let cool.
Beat together the eggs, milk, and vanilla extract. Slice the bread in half and lay it over the apples to cover the entire dish. Pour the egg mixture over everything, making sure all the bread is wet. Sprinkle with cinnamon.
Bake until golden brown and puffy, about 40 to 50 minutes. This dish may be made the night before and reheated just prior to serving.
